texto: Sometimes when you go through things, you bottle them up inside and try to act like everything is fine. Because you want to forget they ever happened. But you have to trust me when I say that doesn't work. In order for you to move on, you have to let them out.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Gwen Cole: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Sometimes when you go through things, you bottle them up inside and try to act like everything is…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, inspriational, moving-on pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e moving-on.

texto: Kale's usually picky about who drives his car, 'he says, smiling again. 'But in this case, I don't think he would mind''Well, technically, it's no longer his car, I point out.He tilts his head slightly. 'Touché.
explicacao: Citação de Gwen Cole sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Kale's usually picky about who drives his car, 'he says, smiling again. 'But in this case, I don'…” articula reflexao, car, funny em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como funny.
